channel.title: Electron on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Electron on Arrans github.io

item.title: janhq/jan
item.description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer. Multiple engine support (llama.cpp, TensorRT-LLM)

item.title: zulip/zulip
item.description: Zulip server and web application. Open-source team chat that helps teams stay productive and focused.

item.title: laurent22/joplin
item.description: Joplin - the secure note taking and to-do app with synchronisation capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

item.title: Foundry376/Mailspring
item.description: 💌 A beautiful, fast and fully open source mail client for Mac, Windows and Linux.

item.title: siyuan-note/siyuan
item.description: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: evolus/pencil
item.description: The Pencil Project’s unique mission is to build a free and opensource tool for making diagrams and GUI prototyping that everyone can use.

item.title: OrangeDrangon/android-messages-desktop
item.description: Android Messages as a Cross-platform Desktop App

item.title: oOthkOo/whatsapp-desktop
item.description: Unofficial WhatsApp Desktop Client for OSX, Linux and Windows. Build with Electron.

item.title: smol-ai/GodMode
item.description: AI Chat Browser: Fast, Full webapp access to ChatGPT / Claude / Bard / Bing / Llama2! I use this 20 times a day.

item.title: felixrieseberg/macintosh.js
item.description: 🖥 A virtual Apple Macintosh with System 8, running in Electron. I’m sorry.

item.title: WAClient/WALC
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp Desktop client for linux systems.
